debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
a : U
h1 : a ∈ A
h2 : empty (A \ {a})
⊢ A = {a}

failed_attempts:
by
  ext x
  constructor <;> intro hx
  · have h3 : x ∈ A \ {a} ∨ x = a := by
      by_cases h4 : x = a
      · exact Or.inr h4
      · exact Or.inl ⟨hx, h4⟩
    cases' h3 with h3 h3
    · exfalso
      exact h2 h3
    · exact h3
  · rw [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hx
    rw [hx]
    exact h1
